summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. No canonical was chosen because the job explicitly identifies this as an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Security-sensitive open PRs are routed to central security handling; already-closed candidates are kept closed; remaining open non-security PRs are kept independently for maintainer review.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive open PRs are out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
Focused non-security test coverage PR with passing checks; keep for normal maintainer review rather than close or merge from this inventory shard.
Valid-looking non-security bugfix PR with unresolved review/change requirements; keep independently for maintainer or author follow-up.
Non-security candidate fix for an open Codex log-retention issue, but review findings remain and this job cannot merge or raise fixes.
Scope and permission-boundary changes should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling rather than backlog cleanup.
URL sanitization allowlist changes are security-sensitive and should route to central OpenClaw security handling.
Maintainer-owned non-security PR with review pending; keep independently for normal maintainer review.
Proxy routing and security-boundary-labeled channel changes should route to central OpenClaw security handling.
Already closed before this plan; no closure action is allowed.
Already closed; keep closed and do not plan any mutation.
